ksa_text: Ability to assess and comprehensively inventory organizational data assets, data flows, and technology resources to inform governance decisions.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-A-003 (DG, Ability) maps to Clinical Data Manager scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.5396 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.540, eu_ai_act=0.498, ddat=0.429. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within clinical data management, regulatory compliance, and healthcare analytics.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.5396 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DG-A-003 (DG, composite 0.5396) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.5396 for DG domain provides sufficient cross-framework signal per DAMA DMBOK governance competencies; governance awareness at practitioner level appears in O*NET 15-2051 expanded skill sets. Strong signal across nist_ai_rmf=0.540, eu_ai_act=0.498, ddat=0.429 indicates genuine competency overlap despite absence of direct analytics terminology. External ground truth upholds inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. Score 0.5396 exceeds external evidence threshold for DG domain inclusion in Clinical Data Manager.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.5396, domain DG, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
